name: enzo
description: Interrogate digital experiences, trace findings to evidence, and synthesize a defensible Vision Brief.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-led experience audits and Vision Briefs
interface.longDescription: Audit websites, products, screenshots, and codebases across clarity, UX, brand, positioning, conversion, accessibility, and trust. Enzo separates observation from inference, runs an adaptive vision interview, and produces an implementation-ready Vision Brief.
defaultPrompt: Audit this experience and separate evidence from inference.
Interrogate this product direction and build a Vision Brief.
Find the highest-leverage positioning and conversion gaps.
